name: Notion-lite Real-time Collaboration (ap-south-1 primary, us-east-1 DR)

invariants.message: Two users editing the same document must converge within 500ms under normal network conditions.
Cross-region failover must complete in under 30s RTO.
If ap-south-1 DynamoDB goes read-only, us-east-1 should sustain writes cleanly.
Redis crash should degrade presence gracefully without reconnect storm.
CRDT lag fault should keep user-visible divergence bounded and measurable.
Search indexing lag should remain within 5 seconds.
